body: Greetings to my sisters and brothers all around the world,  I’m speaking to you from the heart of what’s happening right now.  The protests in Iran are different this time - because people no longer have food to survive. If they return home, many of them will face hunger, and for some, even death. There is simply no other choice left.  Iran is being pushed toward making peace with the world -  but under the form of a new government.  Today and tomorrow, one of the largest protests is expected to take place in the streets. This is happening after a call was made by the son of Iran’s former Shah.  Because of this, the possibility of a regime change has clearly increased.  To all friends who have invested on “No”, I strongly suggest exiting that position as soon as possible to prevent potential losses.  If this message helped you and saved you from losing money, I’d be happy if you show your support by tipping.
